matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Harbourfront Stroll

node.name: Harbourfront Stroll
node.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Distillery District Walk

node.name: Distillery District Walk
node.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 4 > Bloor Street Shopping

node.name: Bloor Street Shopping
node.description: Optional shopping trip along Bloor-Yorkville luxury district. High-end boutiques and designer stores.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 10 > Airport Snack Stop

node.name: Airport Snack Stop
node.description: Generic airport food and coffee before boarding. Forgettable but necessary. Nothing special about airport dining.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 9 > Queen Street West Boutiques

node.name: Queen Street West Boutiques
node.description: Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.
